collection.name: Series Description
collection.description: Editorial narrative about the location or series — historical context, photographer's notes, why it matters. Rendered as rich text on the collection page below the standard description.

collection.name: Location
collection.description: The specific location where the series was photographed, e.g. 'Homebush, New South Wales, Australia'. Displayed in the series info bar on the collection page.

collection.name: Year Photographed
collection.description: The year or range the series was photographed, e.g. '2017' or '2017–2019'. Displayed in the series info bar on the collection page.

collection.name: Historical Period
collection.description: The operational period of the photographed subject, e.g. '1968–2007'. Displayed in the series info bar on the collection page.

collection.name: Current Status
collection.description: The current state of the location, e.g. 'Demolished 2019', 'Heritage listed', or 'Active'. Displayed in the series info bar on the collection page.

product.name: Product rating count
product.description: Total number of ratings from customers

product.name: Google: Custom Product
product.description: Use to indicate whether or not the unique product identifiers (UPIs) GTIN, MPN, and brand are available for your product.

product.name: Collection Series
product.description: The name of the photographic series this product belongs to (e.g. 'Northern Wanderings'). Displayed in the art details block and included in product structured data.

product.name: Photography Location
product.description: The geographic location where the photograph was taken (e.g. 'Homebush, New South Wales'). Displayed in the art details block and included in product structured data.

product.name: Year Photographed
product.description: The year the photograph was taken (e.g. '2019'). Displayed in the art details block and included in product structured data.

product.name: Print Technique
product.description: The printing process used to produce the print (e.g. 'Giclée on Canson Rag'). Displayed as 'Process' in the art details block and included in product structured data.

product.name: Paper / Substrate
product.description: The paper or substrate specification (e.g. 'Canson Infinity Rag Photographique 310 GSM'). Displayed as 'Substrate' in the art details block and included in product structured data.

product.name: Certificate of Authenticity
product.description: Whether a certificate of authenticity is included with this print. Displays a trust badge in the art details block when true.

product.name: Edition Number
product.description: The specific number of this print within its edition run (e.g. 42 for print #42 of 100). When populated, displays alongside edition size as 'Edition 42 of 100'. Use for pre-numbered prints only — not required for standard made-to-order prints.

product.name: Subject Description
product.description: A brief editorial description of the photograph's subject — the building, location, or historical context. Displayed as a paragraph below the art details block when populated. 1–3 sentences recommended.

variant.name: Google: Custom Label 4
variant.description: Label that you assign to a product to help organize bidding and reporting in Shopping campaigns

variant.name: Google: Custom Label 3
variant.description: Label that you assign to a product to help organize bidding and reporting in Shopping campaigns

variant.name: Google: Custom Label 2
variant.description: Label that you assign to a product to help organize bidding and reporting in Shopping campaigns

variant.name: Google: Custom Label 1
variant.description: Label that you assign to a product to help organize bidding and reporting in Shopping campaigns

variant.name: Google: Custom Label 0
variant.description: Label that you assign to a product to help organize bidding and reporting in Shopping campaigns

variant.name: Google: Size System
variant.description: The country of the size system used by your product.

variant.name: Google: Gender
variant.description: The gender for which your product is intended.

variant.name: Google: Condition
variant.description: The condition of your product at time of sale.

variant.name: Google: Age Group
variant.description: The demographic for which your product is intended.

variant.name: Featured Collection Image Variant
variant.description: This sets the default image for the homepage featured collection to a white frame.

variant.name: Dropdown Accordion
variant.description: Accordion-style dropdown content for variant detail panels.

shop.name: Google: Show Store Widget App Embed Block
shop.description: Indicates if the store widget app embed block should be shown.
